title: Zoho Corporation is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Zoho Corporation is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Zoho Corporation in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zoho Corporation:
Zoho Corporation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zoho Corporation!
